title: Sony Server Issues Impact PlayStation Network
description: Sony's PlayStation Network experiences server issues, causing disruptions for thousands of gamers.

sources.title: PlayStation Network down, leaving thousands of gamers unable to play
Update: The Majority Of PlayStation Network Services Are Back Online
Is PlayStation working yet? Issues persist for many after global outage

sections.heading: PlayStation Network Outage
paragraphs: The PlayStation Network has faced server issues, leaving thousands of gamers unable to play, according to BBC.

sections.heading: Service Restoration
paragraphs: Game Informer reports that the majority of PlayStation Network services are back online after the outage.

sections.heading: Ongoing Issues
paragraphs: Despite the restoration of services, AL.com notes that issues persist for many users globally.

faq.q: What is the current status of PlayStation Network?
faq.a: According to Game Informer, the majority of PlayStation Network services are back online after the server issues.

faq.q: Are there still issues affecting PlayStation users?
faq.a: Yes, as reported by AL.com, issues persist for many users globally even after the services have been restored.
